children.heading: Failure to transmit special message
children.label: a Failure to transmit special message

children.text: is to establish a reserve or proposes to defer budget authority with respect to which the President is required to transmit a special message under section 683 or 684 of this title; or
has ordered, permitted, or approved the establishment of such a reserve or a deferral of budget authority;

children.heading: Incorrect classification of special message
children.label: b Incorrect classification of special message
children.text: If the President has transmitted a special message to both Houses of Congress in accordance with section 683 or 684 of this title, and the Comptroller General believes that the President so transmitted the special message in accordance with one of those sections when the special message should have been transmitted in accordance with the other of those sections, the Comptroller General shall make a report to both Houses of the Congress setting forth his reasons.
